Stable managed SDL3-CS hotfix release for SDL 3.4.12.

This release publishes only the managed `SDL3-CS` wrapper. The native packages are unchanged and remain compatible with this wrapper release.

## Package Versions

| Package family | Version |
|----------------|---------|
| `SDL3-CS` | `3.4.12.3` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>` | `3.4.12.1` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>.Image` | `3.4.4.7` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>.Mixer` | `3.2.4.7` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>.TTF` | `3.2.2.7` |
| `SDL3-CS.<Platform>.Shadercross` | `3.0.0.7` |

## Changes

- Fixed [Issue #206](https://github.com/edwardgushchin/SDL3-CS/issues/206) by using `FPoint` for the typed `origin`, `right`, and `down` parameters of `SDL_RenderTextureAffine`, matching the native `const SDL_FPoint *` contract.
- Corrected all private native stubs, managed hook delegates, and public overload combinations while preserving `FRect` for the source rectangle.
- Added signature and forwarding regression coverage for all pointer/typed affine argument combinations.

Applications should update `SDL3-CS` to `3.4.12.3` and keep their existing platform-native package versions shown above.
